(** **********************************************************

Benedikt Ahrens, Chris Kapulkin, Mike Shulman

january 2013


************************************************************)


(** **********************************************************

Contents : Precomposition with a fully faithful and
           essentially surjective functor yields
           an essentially surjective functor

************************************************************)


Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Propositions.
Require Import UniMath.Foundations.Sets.

Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Tactics.
Require Import UniMath.MoreFoundations.Univalence.

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.

Local Open Scope cat.

Local Notation "FF ^-1" := (fully_faithful_inv_hom FF _ _ ).
Local Notation "F '^-i'" := (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection F) (at level 20).

Identifier 'O' now a keyword


Ltac inv_functor HF x y :=
   let H:=fresh in
   set (H:= homotweqinvweq (weq_from_fully_faithful HF x y));
     simpl in H;
     unfold fully_faithful_inv_hom; simpl;
     rewrite H; clear H.


(** * Lengthy preparation for the main result of this file *)

Section precomp_w_ess_surj_ff_is_ess_surj.

(** ** Section variables *)

  Context (A B C: category).
  Hypothesis Ccat : is_univalent C.
  Variable H : functor A B.
  Hypothesis p : essentially_surjective H.
  Hypothesis fH : fully_faithful H.

(**  We prove that precomposition with a [H] yields an essentially surjective functor *)

Section essentially_surjective.


(** ** Specification of preimage [G] of a functor [F] *)

(** Given a functor [F] from [A] to [C], we construct [G] such that
       [F = G O H] *)

Variable F : functor A C.

Section preimage.

(** The type [X b] will be contractible, and [G] is defined as
     the first component of its center. *)

Local Definition X (b : B) := total2 (
 fun ck :
  total2 (λ c : C,
                ∏ a : A,
                     z_iso (H a) b -> z_iso (F a) c) =>
    ∏ t t' : total2 (λ a : A, z_iso (H a) b),
          ∏ f : pr1 t --> pr1 t',
             (#H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t ->
                    #F f · pr2 ck (pr1 t') (pr2 t') = pr2 ck (pr1 t) (pr2 t))).

Local Definition kX {b : B} (t : X b) := (pr2 (pr1 t)).

(** The following is the third component of the center of [X b] *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t · inv_from_z_iso hnot))


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t, t': ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b
f: A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
t': ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 t' ⟧
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 (a,, h)
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a,, h) · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
# H f · pr2 (a',, h') = pr2 (a,, h)
→ # F f
  · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a',, h') · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a,, h) · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
# H f · h' = h
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# F f · # F (fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# F (f · fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
f · fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot) =
fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a anot
  (f · fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a anot
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# H (f · fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
# H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# H f · # H (fH ^-1 (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
# H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# H f · (h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot) =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a anot)
     (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# H f · h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a anot)
     (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# H f · h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot =
h · inv_from_z_iso hnot

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b
f: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
star: # H f · h' = h
# H f · h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot =
# H f · h' · inv_from_z_iso hnot

  apply idpath.
Qed.

(** The center of [X b] *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
X b


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
X b

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: C
X b

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: C
g:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
(fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso a anot
X b

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: C
g:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
(fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso a anot
knot:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
functor_on_z_iso F (g a h): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
X b

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: C
g:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
(fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso a anot
knot:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
functor_on_z_iso F (g a h): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
X b

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: C
g:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
(fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso a anot
knot:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
functor_on_z_iso F (g a h): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · pr2 (F anot,, knot) (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  pr2 (F anot,, knot) (pr1 t) (pr2 t)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
cnot:= F anot: C
g:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
(fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso a anot
knot:= λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
functor_on_z_iso F (g a h): ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t' · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
  # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

  apply X_aux_type_center_of_contr_proof.
Defined.

(** Any inhabitant of [X b] is equal to the center of [X b]. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
∏ t : X b, t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
∏ t : X b, t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) = pr1 t
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) = pr1 t
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
w:= isotoid C Ccat (pr2 (pr1 t) anot hnot)
:
pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 t): pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 t)
pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) = pr1 t

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
w:= isotoid C Ccat (pr2 (pr1 t) anot hnot)
:
pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 t): pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 t)
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (pr2 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot))) =
pr2 (pr1 t)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
w:= isotoid C Ccat (pr2 (pr1 t) anot hnot)
:
pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 t): pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 t)
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) =
pr2 (pr1 t)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · pr2 (c1,, k1) (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  pr2 (c1,, k1) (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat
  (pr2 (pr1 ((c1,, k1),, q1)) anot hnot): pr1 (pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr1 (pr1 ((c1,, k1),, q1))
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) =
pr2 (pr1 ((c1,, k1),, q1))

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) =
k1

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a =
k1 a

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot) gah: # H gah · pr2 (anot,, hnot) = pr2 (a,, h)
→ # F gah
  · k1 (pr1 (anot,, hnot)) (pr2 (anot,, hnot)) =
  k1 (pr1 (a,, h)) (pr2 (a,, h))
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

b: B

hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C

q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
# H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot = h
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)

h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
h · inv_from_z_iso hnot · hnot = h

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =

  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot

  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
h · (inv_from_z_iso hnot · hnot) = h

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
h · identity b = h

      apply id_right.
    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

p: essentially_surjective H

b: B

c1: C

(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =

  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot

h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

p: essentially_surjective H

q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h = k1 a h

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h =
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (idtoiso w)
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (idtoiso w) = k1 a h

(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),

→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h

· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h =
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (idtoiso w)
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
w0: F anot = c1
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) w0
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h =
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (idtoiso w0)

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = F anot
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c)
  (idpath (F anot))
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h =
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (idtoiso (idpath (F anot)))

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = F anot
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c)
  (idpath (F anot))
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h =
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (identity_z_iso (F anot))

h

· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h

  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c)
  (idpath (F anot))
  (λ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
   functor_on_z_iso F

        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)))) a
  h =

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = F anot
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· identity (F anot)

a: A

  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot

· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h

# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· identity (F anot)
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) (F anot)
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = F anot
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) =
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

      apply idpath.
    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
z_iso_comp
  (functor_on_z_iso F
     ((fH ^-i)
        (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot))))
  (idtoiso w) = k1 a h

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

b: B
anot: A

c1: C

q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),

→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)

h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))

feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· idtoiso (isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot)) = k1 a h

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
c1: C
k1: ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c1
q1: ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · k1 (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
  k1 (pr1 t) (pr2 t)
w:= isotoid C Ccat (k1 anot hnot): F anot = c1
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
gah:= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso hnot)): z_iso a anot
qhelp:= q1 (a,, h) (anot,, hnot)
  (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)): # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · hnot =
h
→ # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
  · k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
feedtoqhelp: # H (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· hnot = h
quack: # F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot))
· k1 anot hnot = k1 a h
# F (fH ^-1 (h · inv_from_z_iso hnot)) · k1 anot hnot =
k1 a h

    apply quack.
  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
t = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot = t

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
transportf
  (λ ck : ∑ c : C,
          ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c,
   ∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
   (f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
   # H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
   → # F f · pr2 ck (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
     pr2 ck (pr1 t) (pr2 t)) Hpr1
  (pr2 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot)) =
pr2 t

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
isaprop
  (∏ (t0 t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b)
   (f : A ⟦ pr1 t0, pr1 t' ⟧),
   # H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t0
   → # F f · pr2 (pr1 t) (pr1 t') (pr2 t') =
     pr2 (pr1 t) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
anot: A
hnot: z_iso (H anot) b
t: X b
Hpr1: pr1 (X_aux_type_center_of_contr b anot hnot) =
pr1 t
t0, t1: ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b
t2: A ⟦ pr1 t0, pr1 t1 ⟧
t3: # H t2 · pr2 t1 = pr2 t0
isofhlevel 1
  (# F t2 · pr2 (pr1 t) (pr1 t1) (pr2 t1) =
   pr2 (pr1 t) (pr1 t0) (pr2 t0))

  apply C.
Qed.


(** Putting everything together: [X b] is contractible. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
∏ b : B, iscontr (X b)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
∏ b : B, iscontr (X b)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
iscontr (X b)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
isaprop (iscontr (X b))
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
HH: isaprop (iscontr (X b))
iscontr (X b)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
HH: isaprop (iscontr (X b))
iscontr (X b)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
HH: isaprop (iscontr (X b))
(∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b) → iscontr (X b),, HH

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
HH: isaprop (iscontr (X b))
t: ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b
iscontr (X b),, HH

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
HH: isaprop (iscontr (X b))
t: ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b
∏ t0 : X b,
t0 = X_aux_type_center_of_contr b (pr1 t) (pr2 t)

  apply (X_aux_type_contr_eq b (pr1 t) (pr2 t)).
Defined.

(** The object part of [G], [Go b], is defined as the first component of
    the center of [X b]. *)

(** *** [G] on objects *)

Definition Go : B -> C :=
   λ b : B, pr1 (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X b))).

Local Definition k (b : B) :
     ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b -> z_iso (F a) (Go b) :=
              pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X b))).

Local Definition q (b : B) := pr2 (pr1 (iscontr_X b)).


(** Given any inhabitant of [X b], its first component is equal to [Go b]. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
pr1 (pr1 t) = Go b


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
pr1 (pr1 t) = Go b

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
p1:= pr2 (iscontr_X b) t: t = pr1 (iscontr_X b)
pr1 (pr1 t) = Go b

  exact (base_paths _ _ (base_paths _ _ p1)).
Defined.

(** Given any inhabitant [t : X b], its second component is equal to [k b],
       modulo transport along [Xphi b t]. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a0 : A, z_iso (H a0) b → z_iso (F a0) c)
  (Xphi b t) (kX t) a h = k b a h


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a0 : A, z_iso (H a0) b → z_iso (F a0) c)
  (Xphi b t) (kX t) a h = k b a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a0 : A, z_iso (H a0) b → z_iso (F a0) c)
  (Xphi b t) (kX t) a h =
pr2 (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X b))) a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a0 : A, z_iso (H a0) b → z_iso (F a0) c)
  (Xphi b t) (kX t) a h =
transportf
  (λ x : C, ∏ a0 : A, z_iso (H a0) b → z_iso (F a0) x)
  (base_paths (pr1 t) (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X b)))
     (base_paths t (pr1 (iscontr_X b))
        (pr2 (iscontr_X b) t))) (pr2 (pr1 t)) a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c)
  (Xphi b t) (kX t) a h =
transportf
  (λ x : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) x)
  (base_paths (pr1 t) (pr1 (pr1 (iscontr_X b)))
     (base_paths t (pr1 (iscontr_X b))
        (pr2 (iscontr_X b) t))) (pr2 (pr1 t)) a h

  apply maponpaths, idpath.
Qed.

(** Similarly to the lemma before, the second component of [t] is the same
    as [k b], modulo postcomposition with an isomorphism. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
k b a h · idtoiso (! Xphi b t) = kX t a h


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b),
k b a h · idtoiso (! Xphi b t) = kX t a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
k b a h · idtoiso (! Xphi b t) = kX t a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c)
  (Xphi b t) (kX t) a h · idtoiso (! Xphi b t) =
kX t a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
∏ p : pr1 (pr1 t) = Go b,
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c) p
  (kX t) a h · idtoiso (! p) = kX t a h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
t: X b
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
transportf
  (λ c : C, ∏ a : A, z_iso (H a) b → z_iso (F a) c)
  (idpath (pr1 (pr1 t))) (kX t) a h
· idtoiso (! idpath (pr1 (pr1 t))) = kX t a h

  apply id_right.
Qed.


(*
Lemma k_transport (b : ob B) (*t : X b*) (c : ob C)
   (p : pr1 (pr1 t) = c) (a : ob A) (h : iso (pr1 H a) b):
transportf (λ c' : ob C, ∏ a : ob A, iso (pr1 H a) b ->
                          iso ((pr1 F) a) c')
   p (k) a h = (k b) b a h · idtoiso p .
*)


(** *** Preparation for [G] on morphisms *)

(** [G f] will be defined as the first component of the center of
     contraction of [Y f]. *)

Local Definition Y {b b' : B} (f : b --> b') :=
  total2 (fun g : Go b --> Go b' =>
      ∏ a : A,
        ∏ h : z_iso (H a) b,
          ∏ a' : A,
            ∏ h' : z_iso (H a') b',
              ∏ l : a --> a',
                #H l · h' = h · f -> #F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g).


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
     · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
     · k b' a0' h0')


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
     · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
     · k b' a0' h0')

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H

b, b': B

m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
# H m · pr2 (a,, h) = pr2 (a0,, h0)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
# H (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · h = h0

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
h0 · inv_from_z_iso h · h = h0

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A

a0': A

h: z_iso (H a) b

alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
h0 · (inv_from_z_iso h · h) = h0

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
h0 · identity b = h0

    apply id_right.
  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

a0': A

a': A

  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
   · # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0')

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
# H (fH ^-1 hfh) · (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
hfh · (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'
· (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'
· (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0')
· inv_from_z_iso h'
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0')
· inv_from_z_iso h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'

h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A

m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧

g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'
· (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0')
· inv_from_z_iso h'
 repeat rewrite assoc; apply idpath. 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0')
· inv_from_z_iso h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · # H l

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h' =
h0 · inv_from_z_iso h · # H l

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
h0 · (f · inv_from_z_iso h') =
h0 · (inv_from_z_iso h · # H l)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
# H l = h · (f · inv_from_z_iso h')

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C

sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =

# H l = h · f · inv_from_z_iso h'

    apply z_iso_inv_on_left, pathsinv0, alpha.
  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
# F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g0

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
inv_from_z_iso m · l0 = l · inv_from_z_iso m'
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0 = l · inv_from_z_iso m'
# F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g0

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
inv_from_z_iso m · l0 = l · inv_from_z_iso m'
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
hfh:= h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0': B ⟦ H a0, H a0' ⟧
l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
l0 = m · (l · inv_from_z_iso m')

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C

a0': A

a': A

k b a0 h0

k b' a0' h0'

l0 = m · l · inv_from_z_iso m'

    apply z_iso_inv_on_left,
          (invmaponpathsweq (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' )),
          pathsinv0,
      sssss.

(** The center of [Y b b' f]. *)

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
Y f

a0': A

Y f

F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B

a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'

l0:= fH ^-1 hfh: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
g0:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0': C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f → # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g0

  apply Y_inhab_proof.
Defined.

(** Any inhabitant of [Y b b' f] is equal to the center. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
∏ t : Y f, t = Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0'

p: essentially_surjective H

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A

t: Y f

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
g1: C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
· # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
· k b' a0' h0' = g1
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H

b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A

a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0' = t

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
g1: C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧
r1: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
· (# F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
   · k b' a0' h0') = g1
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0' = t

(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g1
# F (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
· k b' a0' h0' = k b a0 h0 · g1

transportf
  (λ g : C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧,
   ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
   (h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
   # H l · h' = h · f
   → # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · g) Hpr
  (pr2 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0')) = pr2 t

b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
isaprop
  (∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
   (h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
   # H l · h' = h · f
   → # F l · k b' a' h' = k b a h · pr1 t)

  
A, B, C: category

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
t: Y f
Hpr: pr1 (Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0') = pr1 t
t0: A
t1: z_iso (H t0) b
t2: A
t3: z_iso (H t2) b'
t4: A ⟦ t0, t2 ⟧
t5: # H t4 · t3 = t1 · f
isofhlevel 1 (# F t4 · k b' t2 t3 = k b t0 t1 · pr1 t)

  apply C.
Qed.

(** The type [Y b b' f] is contractible. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
iscontr (Y f)

H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
iscontr (Y f)

p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
isaprop (iscontr (Y f))

p: essentially_surjective H

f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

(∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) b) → iscontr (Y f),, HH

H: A ⟶ B

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
HH: isaprop (iscontr (Y f))
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
∏ t : Y f, t = Y_inhab b b' f a0 h0 a0' h0'

  apply Y_contr_eq.
Defined.

(** *** [G] on morphisms *)

(** We now have the data necessary to define the functor [G]. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
functor_data B C


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
functor_data B C

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
∏ a b : B, B ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ Go a, Go b ⟧

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
C ⟦ Go b, Go b' ⟧

  exact (pr1 (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f))).
Defined.



Identifier 'G' now a keyword


(** The above data is indeed functorial. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
is_functor preimage_functor_data


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
is_functor preimage_functor_data

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
functor_idax preimage_functor_data
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
functor_compax preimage_functor_data

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
functor_idax preimage_functor_data
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
∏ a : B,
# preimage_functor_data (identity a) =
identity (preimage_functor_data a)
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
∏ a : B, G (identity a) = identity (Go a)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b) (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b) (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)

l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
LL: # H l · h' = h · identity b
# F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde
  (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = G (identity b)
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde
  (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = G (identity b)
G (identity b) = identity (Go b)

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b: B
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b)
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · identity b
→ # F l · k b a' h' = k b a h · identity (Go b)
Gbrtilde:= identity (Go b),, PR2 : Y (identity b): Y (identity b)
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b)) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde
  (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b (identity b))) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = G (identity b)
pr1 Gbrtilde = identity (Go b)

    apply idpath.

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'
· (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0'') =
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0') · f'
· inv_from_z_iso h0''
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0') · f'
· inv_from_z_iso h0'' = # H l0''

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a0': A

a0'': A

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'
· (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0'') =
h0 · f · (inv_from_z_iso h0' · h0') · f'
· inv_from_z_iso h0''
 repeat rewrite assoc; apply idpath.

p: essentially_surjective H

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
h0 · f · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0'' =
h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''

      repeat rewrite assoc; apply idpath.
    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') b') (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')

# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =

  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
