A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

a0'': A

L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
# H m · pr2 (a,, h) = pr2 (a0,, h0)

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
# H (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · h = h0

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
h0 · inv_from_z_iso h · h = h0

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
h0 · (inv_from_z_iso h · h) = h0

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
h0 · identity b = h0

        apply id_right.
      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧

m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'

p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C

p: essentially_surjective H

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

p: essentially_surjective H

l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a

  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
# H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)

F: A ⟶ C

h0': z_iso (H a0') b'

h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧

l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A

l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a

k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
# H l0 · (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: z_iso (H a0) b

a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A

l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a

  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
# H (fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'))
· (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

h0 · (inv_from_z_iso h · # H l)

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
f · inv_from_z_iso h' = inv_from_z_iso h · # H l

a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' (l0 · m') =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a' (m · l)

        apply sssss.
      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
sssss: # H (l0 · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0 = l · inv_from_z_iso m'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0')

h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''

h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0 = l · inv_from_z_iso m'
sss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h))
  (k b a0 h0) sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · k b a h =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)
# F (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · k b a h =
k b a0 h0

        apply sss'.

h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: pr1
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b' a' h')) = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
k b' a0' h0' = functor_on_z_iso F m' · k b' a' h'

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: pr1
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b' a' h')) = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
functor_on_z_iso F m' · k b' a' h' = k b' a0' h0'

  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h'))
· k b' a' h' = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')

p: essentially_surjective H

b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''

k b' a0' h0'

  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') ssss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h'))
· k b' a' h' = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
# F (fH ^-1 (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h')) · k b' a' h' =
k b' a0' h0'

        apply ssss'; clear ssss'.
      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
star4: inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F l · inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b' a0' h0'

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · f
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m') (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
star4: inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
# F l · k b' a' h' =
# F l
· (inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
   · k b' a0' h0')

p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C

· k b' a0' h0' = k b' a' h'
# F l · k b' a' h' = # F l · k b' a' h'

      apply idpath.
    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''

(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = G f
G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0',, PR2
:
Y f: Y f
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b b' f) Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)
H'':= base_paths Gbrtilde (pr1 (Y_iscontr b b' f)) H': pr1 Gbrtilde = G f
pr1 Gbrtilde =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'

      apply idpath.

l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f
→ # F l · k b' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
     · k b' a0' h0')
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
h0' · inv_from_z_iso h' · h' = h0'

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
h0' · (inv_from_z_iso h' · h') = h0'

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
h0' · identity b' = h0'

        apply id_right.
      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C

p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'

  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''

k b' a0' h0'

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l0' · (h0'' · inv_from_z_iso h'') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') · l')

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

· k b' a0' h0'

k b' a0' h0'

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h') · l')

m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h'' =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a')
     (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h')) · # H l'

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h'' =
h0' · inv_from_z_iso h' · # H l'

l0' = m · (l' · inv_from_z_iso m')

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''

k b' a0' h0'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
l0' = m · l' · inv_from_z_iso m'

        apply z_iso_inv_on_left,
          (invmaponpathsweq (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0' a'' )),
          pathsinv0,
          sssss.

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A

a0'': A

l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧

HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'

  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0' =
l' · inv_from_z_iso m'
sss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h'))
· k b' a' h' = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b' a' h'
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b' a' h') =
k b' a0' h0'
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0' =
l' · inv_from_z_iso m'
sss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m)
     (k b' a' h')) (k b' a0' h0') sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0' · inv_from_z_iso h'))
· k b' a' h' = pr1 (k b' a0' h0')
k b' a' h' · inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m)

          apply pathsinv0, sss'.

h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0' · m') = # H (m · l')
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0' =
l' · inv_from_z_iso m'
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F (l' · inv_from_z_iso m') · k b'' a0'' h0''
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: z_iso (H a0) b

h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F (l' · inv_from_z_iso m') · k b'' a0'' h0''

h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

a'': A

  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
k b'' a0'' h0'' =

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
ssss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b'' a'' h'')) (k b'' a0'' h0'') ssss: pr1
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b'' a'' h'')) = pr1 (k b'' a0'' h0'')
k b'' a0'' h0'' =
functor_on_z_iso F m' · k b'' a'' h''

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
ssss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b'' a'' h'')) (k b'' a0'' h0'') ssss: pr1
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
     (k b'' a'' h'')) = pr1 (k b'' a0'' h0'')
functor_on_z_iso F m' · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b'' a0'' h0''

        simpl in *; apply ssss'.

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

· k b' a0' h0'

h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A

m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l' · inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b'' a0'' h0''

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H

a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F l'
· (inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') b'
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l': A ⟦ a', a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l' · h'' = h' · f'
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h')): z_iso a0' a'
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
star4: inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m')
· k b'' a0'' h0'' = k b'' a'' h''
# F l' · k b'' a'' h'' = # F l' · k b'' a'' h''

      apply idpath.
    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b') 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b') 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b') 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b') 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y f': Y f'
G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b') 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · f'
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b' a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y f': Y f'
H':= pr2 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f') Gbrtilde: Gbrtilde = pr1 (Y_iscontr b' b'' f')
G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

Y f': Y f'

· k b'' a0'' h0''

      apply idpath.

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'

h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧

a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

· k b' a0' h0'

a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A

a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
# H m' · pr2 (a'',, h'') = pr2 (a0'',, h0'')

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'

inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''

k b a0 h0
h0'' · inv_from_z_iso h'' · h'' = h0''

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A

· k b' a0' h0'

# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H (fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''))
· (h0'' · inv_from_z_iso h'') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

        
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''
· (h0'' · inv_from_z_iso h'') =
# H
  (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a)
     (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h) · l)

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
# H l · h'' = h · (f · f')

        apply alpha.

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a0': A

a0'': A

l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''

m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

p: essentially_surjective H

b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b

h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

· k b' a0' h0'

h: z_iso (H a) b

h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a'' (m · l) =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a0 a'' (l0'' · m')

        apply pathsinv0, sssss.

· k b' a0' h0'

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0'' =
l · inv_from_z_iso m'
sss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h))
  (k b a0 h0) sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · k b a h =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''

l · inv_from_z_iso m'

  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h))
  (k b a0 h0) sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · k b a h =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)
k b a h · inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m)
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0'' =
l · inv_from_z_iso m'
sss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h))
  (k b a0 h0) sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · k b a h =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)
sss'': k b a h · inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m)
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
k b a h
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
sss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h) =
k b a0 h0
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0'' =
l · inv_from_z_iso m'
sss':= base_paths
  (z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m) (k b a h))
  (k b a0 h0) sss: # F (fH ^-1 (h0 · inv_from_z_iso h)) · k b a h =
pr1 (k b a0 h0)
k b a h · inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) =
inv_from_z_iso (functor_on_z_iso F m)

a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) b
a'': A
h'': z_iso (H a'') b''
l: A ⟦ a, a'' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h'' = h · (f · f')
m:= (fH ^-i) (z_iso_comp h0 (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h)): z_iso a0 a
m':= (fH ^-i)
  (z_iso_comp h0'' (z_iso_inv_from_z_iso h'')): z_iso a0'' a''
ssss: z_iso_comp (functor_on_z_iso F m')
  (k b'' a'' h'') = k b'' a0'' h0''
sssss: # H (l0'' · m') = # H (m · l)
star5: inv_from_z_iso m · l0'' =
l · inv_from_z_iso m'
# F l · k b'' a'' h'' =
# F (l · inv_from_z_iso m') · k b'' a0'' h0''

· k b' a0' h0'

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y (f · f'): Y (f · f')
G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
Gbrtilde:= inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0'',, PR2
:
Y (f · f'): Y (f · f')
pr1 Gbrtilde =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''

      apply idpath. 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
PR2: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) b) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') b'')
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · (f · f')
→ # F l · k b'' a' h' =
  k b a h
  · (inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
     · k b'' a0'' h0'')
HGff': G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') = G f · G f'

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B

f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧

a0'': A

l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'

inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'

· k b'' a0'' h0''

· (k b' a0' h0' · inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0'))
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''

Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H

F: A ⟶ C

· k b' a0' h0'

· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'' =

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A

a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'

· k b'' a0'' h0''

inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
· (# F l0'' · k b'' a0'' h0'') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
· (# F l0 · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''))

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· (k b' a0' h0' · inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0'))
· # F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0 · k b' a0' h0'
· (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
   · k b'' a0'' h0'')

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
b, b', b'': B
f: B ⟦ b, b' ⟧
f': B ⟦ b', b'' ⟧
a0: A
h0: z_iso (H a0) b
a0': A
h0': z_iso (H a0') b'
a0'': A
h0'': z_iso (H a0'') b''
l0:= fH ^-1 (h0 · f · inv_from_z_iso h0'): A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
l0':= fH ^-1 (h0' · f' · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0', a0'' ⟧
l0'':= fH ^-1 (h0 · (f · f') · inv_from_z_iso h0''): A ⟦ a0, a0'' ⟧
L: l0 · l0' = l0''
HGf: G f =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0
· k b' a0' h0'
HGf': G f' =
inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0') · # F l0'
· k b'' a0'' h0''
HGff': G (f · f') =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0) · # F l0''
· k b'' a0'' h0''
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
· (# F l0
   · (k b' a0' h0'
      · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0')
         · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0'')))) =
inv_from_z_iso (k b a0 h0)
· (# F l0
   · (k b' a0' h0'
      · (inv_from_z_iso (k b' a0' h0')
         · (# F l0' · k b'' a0'' h0''))))

    apply idpath.
Qed.


(** We call the functor [GG] ... *)

Definition GG : [B, C, C] := tpair _ preimage_functor_data
                    is_functor_preimage_functor_data.

(** ** [G] is the preimage of [F] under [ _ O H] *)

(** Given any [a : A], we produce an element in [X (H a)], whose
     first component is [F a].
   This allows to prove [G (H a) = F a]. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0: A
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) (H a0))
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t')) = # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t))


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0: A
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) (H a0))
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t')) = # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0: A
∏ (t t' : ∑ a : A, z_iso (H a) (H a0))
(f : A ⟦ pr1 t, pr1 t' ⟧),
# H f · pr2 t' = pr2 t
→ # F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t')) = # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 t))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · pr2 (a',, h') = pr2 (a,, h)
# F f · # F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a',, h'))) =
# F (fH ^-1 (pr2 (a,, h)))

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# F f · # F (fH ^-1 h') = # F (fH ^-1 h)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# F (f · fH ^-1 h') = # F (fH ^-1 h)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
f · fH ^-1 h' = fH ^-1 h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a a0 (f · fH ^-1 h') =
weq_from_fully_faithful fH a a0 (fH ^-1 h)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# H (f · invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a' a0) h') =
h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# H f
· # H (invmap (weq_from_fully_faithful fH a' a0) h') =
h

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0)
f: A ⟦ pr1 (a,, h), pr1 (a',, h') ⟧
L: # H f · h' = h
# H f · h' = h

  apply L.
Qed.


Definition kFa (a0 : A) : ∏ a : A,
  z_iso (H a) (H a0) -> z_iso (F a) (F a0) :=
 fun (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) =>
   functor_on_z_iso F
                  (iso_from_fully_faithful_reflection fH h).

Definition XtripleF (a0 : A) : X (H a0) :=
   tpair _ (tpair _ (F a0) (kFa a0)) (qF a0).



A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0: A
pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 = pr1 (pr1 F) a0


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0: A
pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 = pr1 (pr1 F) a0

  exact (!Xphi _ (XtripleF a0)).
Defined.


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) = pr1 (pr1 F)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) = pr1 (pr1 F)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) ~ pr1 (pr1 F)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
∏ x : A, pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) x = pr1 (pr1 F) x

  apply phi.
Defined.

(** Now for the functor as a whole. It remains to prove
    equality on morphisms, modulo transport. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
H ∙ GG = F


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
H ∙ GG = F

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
pr1 (H ∙ GG) = pr1 F

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
transportf
  (λ F : A → C, ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  extphi (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG))) = pr2 (pr1 F)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf
  (λ F : A → C, ∏ a b : A, A ⟦ a, b ⟧ → C ⟦ F a, F b ⟧)
  extphi (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG))) a0 a0' f =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
     (pr1 (pr1 F)) extphi a0)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
     (pr1 (pr1 F)) extphi a0')
  (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f) = pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
double_transport
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
     (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (funextsec (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
        (pr1 (pr1 F)) phi) a0)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
     (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (funextsec (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
        (pr1 (pr1 F)) phi) a0')
  (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f) = pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ pr1 (pr1 F) a0, c ⟧)
  (toforallpaths (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
     (pr1 (pr1 F))
     (funextsec (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
        (pr1 (pr1 F)) phi) a0')
  (transportf
     (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0' ⟧)
     (toforallpaths (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
        (pr1 (pr1 F))
        (funextsec (λ _ : A, C) (pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)))
           (pr1 (pr1 F)) phi) a0)
     (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f)) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ pr1 (pr1 F) a0, c ⟧)
  (phi a0')
  (transportf
     (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0' ⟧)
     (phi a0) (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f)) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
transportf (λ c : C, C ⟦ c, pr1 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0' ⟧)
  (phi a0) (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f)
· idtoiso (phi a0') = pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
idtoiso (! phi a0) · pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f
· idtoiso (phi a0') = pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f · idtoiso (phi a0') =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f · idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0')) (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f · idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) (a' : A)
(h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0')) (l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
 
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
# F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
k (H a0) a h
· (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
   · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
# F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
k (H a0) a h · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f)
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0'))

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
k (H a0) a h · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f) =
# F l · k (H a0') a' h' · idtoiso (phi a0')

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
k (H a0) a h
· (idtoiso (! Xphi (H a0) (XtripleF a0)) · # F f) =
# F l · k (H a0') a' h'
· idtoiso (! Xphi (H a0') (XtripleF a0'))

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
k (H a0) a h · idtoiso (! Xphi (H a0) (XtripleF a0))
· # F f =
# F l · k (H a0') a' h'
· idtoiso (! Xphi (H a0') (XtripleF a0'))

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
kX (XtripleF a0) a h · # F f =
# F l · k (H a0') a' h'
· idtoiso (! Xphi (H a0') (XtripleF a0'))

      
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
a: A
h: z_iso (H a) (H a0)
a': A
h': z_iso (H a') (H a0')
l: A ⟦ a, a' ⟧
alpha: # H l · h' = h · # H f
kX (XtripleF a0) a h · # F f =
# F l
· (k (H a0') a' h'
   · idtoiso (! Xphi (H a0') (XtripleF a0')))

H: A ⟶ B

# F l · kX (XtripleF a0') a' h'

A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f · idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
Ybla:= idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')),, PSIf
:
Y (# H f): Y (# H f)
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f · idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
Ybla:= idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')),, PSIf
:
Y (# H f): Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
z_iso_inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· (pr2 (pr1 (H ∙ GG)) a0 a0' f · idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
Ybla:= idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')) =
G (# (pr1 H) f)
inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0))
· (G (# H f) · idtoiso (phi a0')) =
pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

p: essentially_surjective H

a0, a0': A

A, B, C: category

H: A ⟶ B

a0, a0': A

(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),

  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0)

· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')) =
G (# (pr1 H) f)
# F f
· (inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0'))
   · idtoiso (phi a0')) = pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

    
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: A ⟶ C
a0, a0': A
f: A ⟦ a0, a0' ⟧
PSIf: ∏ (a : A) (h : z_iso (H a) (H a0)) 
(a' : A) (h' : z_iso (H a') (H a0'))
(l : A ⟦ a, a' ⟧),
# H l · h' = h · # H f
→ # F l · k (H a0') a' h' =
  k (H a0) a h
  · (idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
     · inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')))
Ybla:= idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')),, PSIf: Y (# H f)
Ycontr:= pr2
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f)) Ybla: Ybla =
pr1
  (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) (pr1 H a0')
     (# (pr1 H) f))
Ycontr2:= base_paths Ybla
  (pr1
     (Y_iscontr (pr1 H a0) 
        (pr1 H a0') (# (pr1 H) f))) Ycontr: idtoiso (phi a0) · # F f
· inv_from_z_iso (idtoiso (phi a0')) =
G (# (pr1 H) f)
# F f = pr2 (pr1 F) a0 a0' f

    apply idpath.
Qed.


End preimage.

End essentially_surjective.


(** * Precomposition with an ess. surj. and f. f. functor is ess. surj. *)
(** Abstracting from [F] by closing the previous section,
    we can prove essential surjectivity of [_ O H]. *)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
essentially_surjective
  (pre_composition_functor A B C H)


A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
essentially_surjective
  (pre_composition_functor A B C H)

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: [A, C]
p': hProp
f: (∑ a : [B, C],
 z_iso (pre_composition_functor A B C H a) F) → p'
p'

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: [A, C]
p': hProp
f: (∑ a : [B, C],
 z_iso (pre_composition_functor A B C H a) F) → p'
∑ a : [B, C],
z_iso (pre_composition_functor A B C H a) F

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: [A, C]
p': hProp
f: (∑ a : [B, C],
 z_iso (pre_composition_functor A B C H a) F) → p'
z_iso (pre_composition_functor A B C H (GG F)) F

  
A, B, C: category
Ccat: is_univalent C
H: A ⟶ B
p: essentially_surjective H
fH: fully_faithful H
F: [A, C]
p': hProp
f: (∑ a : [B, C],
 z_iso (pre_composition_functor A B C H a) F) → p'
pre_composition_functor A B C H (GG F) = F

  apply is_preimage_for_pre_composition.
Qed.

End precomp_w_ess_surj_ff_is_ess_surj.
